Localization.Description: Suspicious logon via Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to host {dst.host} using Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} connected to host {dst.host} using Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
